thesis: Abbott Laboratories is a diversified global healthcare compounder across medical devices, diagnostics, nutrition, and emerging-market pharmaceuticals. FY2025 net sales were $44.3B with Medical Devices ($21.4B) as the margin engine; owner cash is ~$4.23 per share from operating cash flow minus capital spending.
why_market_wrong: No dated mispricing signal (HK predictive attribute: none). The market may under-credit durable device growth (Libre CGM, structural heart) while overweighting post-COVID diagnostics normalization and Q1 2026 margin compression.

key_assumptions.input: Starting free cash flow per share
key_assumptions.source: FY2025 OCF $9.566B minus capex $2.171B ÷ ~1,748M shares (10-K FY2025)
core $96.02 + net financial $0.50 − margin reserve $4.50; proof-first bridge 2026-07-21
Mid-single-digit revenue growth; Libre and cardiovascular mix sustain owner cash

open_questions: Does Q1 2026 margin dip reflect mix or sustained cost inflation?
Libre share vs Dexcom in next two quarters
Confirm live price after mechanical refresh
